1901860.name: Seneca 7: A Cyberpunk Odyssey
1901860.description:
🪐 About This Game

S7 Cyberpunk: A Silly Sci-Fi-Fantasy Action RPG

Howdy! I’m Posey — and this is my ultimate love letter to my wife, my two besties-for-resties, and every gamer who ever froze their butt off waiting for a midnight release.

S7 Cyberpunk is what happens when love, chaos, and craft collide: a third-person action RPG that blends co-op adventure, competitive PvP, and deep RPG systems inside a world built by hand — and heart — one weird pixel at a time.

💾 The Early Access Prologue Era

This isn’t your typical Early Access.
Every episode you play is part of the story and the development itself — 36 playable chapters that each test a new system, mechanic, or wild idea as we build the final game together.

You’re not just testing. You’re helping us make history — and maybe break a few things along the way.

Your journey starts inside the cryo-sleep simulation aboard humanity’s last ark, where settlers dream of the life waiting below. The world grows with every player, every update, and every bug we lovingly patch with duct tape and hope.

⚙️ What to Expect

  • Third-Person Action RPG: Combat, explore, and craft your story on the frontier of Planet 7.

  • Co-op Adventure Mode: Team up with 1-3 players in cinematic story missions.

  • PvP & Mini-Games: Battle friends or rivals for glory (and bragging rights).

  • Deep RPG Systems: Build your settler’s class, race, and playstyle — your way.

  • Playable Demo Available: Grab the free preview and experience the Prologue Era. (Cold starts take a sec — it’s just the game warming up for you!)

💡 The Vision

This is game development turned inside out. The Early Access Era isn’t about getting early — it’s about getting involved.
The build you’re playing is the prequel to everything — 30–40 years before the main trilogy, Seneca 7: A Cyberpunk Odyssey.

When that game launches, no one — not even my wife — will have seen it until day one. Because mystery is magic, and we’re bringing that 90s wonder back: standing in line, heart racing, controller ready, waiting to see what’s behind the title screen for the first time.

Made by a husband, powered by friendship, and held together by caffeine and dreams — S7 Cyberpunk is our love letter to the games that made us believe in the impossible.

Welcome to the new frontier, settler. 💜

英语*
